name: w3c-crosswalk
description: W3C VC-JWT, VP-JWT, and did:webs crosswalk packages and verifier tooling

scripts.check:js: npm --prefix packages/signify-w3c run check && npm --prefix packages/signify-did-webs run check && npm --prefix packages/webs-did-resolver run check
scripts.test:js: npm --prefix packages/signify-w3c test && npm --prefix packages/signify-did-webs test && npm --prefix packages/webs-did-resolver test
